title: Slashblade Murasame
body:
**Ciallo～(∠・ω<)⌒★**
This is a addon for Slashblade:Resharped.The mod added a unique salshblade into the game which you can find it in a shrine(only generate in cherry grove biome).
![shrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be1fcbd8395b8de7a81a511a74d39f0e30778fc_0.webp)

There will be three preconditions which are as follw:

1. Experience level >= 50.
1. Have killed 500 undead mobs.
1. Have no less than 5 kinds of positive posion effects.

You are surpposed to ge Meito「murasamemaru」after you click on the embedded stone in the shrine.
![embedded stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74153f49a2a604811a957cb1b92a703c3ecd66d6_0.webp)

After you get Meito「murasamemaru」there is still a space to evolute it,whose preconditions are as follw:

1. Have more than 1000 kill counts on the blade.
1. Have more than 50000 proudsoul count on the blade.
1. Have a good night with the blade in hand.


After the blade's evolution,it should become Shinto「murasamemaru」.When you hold the blade in hand,the soul of the  blade "Murasame" will be always by your side(tbh there is no pratical meaning).At the same time,there will be multiple voices which are built into the blade.

![blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c05c72c380eb6b172df59fe52fc6f9bdb761701_0.webp)

btw im so bad at java so i let deepseek helped me XD

**As most of the codes were written by ai,there could be a lot of bugs.**





mod tested under forge47.4.0 / Slashblade:Resharped 0.6.0
